title: Undergraduate Symposium & Large Group Poster Submissions - Poster Printing
body: Note: These instructions are for registrants of the Undergraduate Symposium or for groups whose instructors have worked with College Library to handle payment and directed them to this page. All other large format printing users should refer to Poster Printing Support for Patrons . Video Instructions: linked here. Undergraduate Symposium and Large Group Poster Submissions MUST follow these instructions. Do NOT Create a new order from scratch, or it will not be covered. Create a poster with dimensions as specified by your instructor or the program you are printing for. For Undergraduate Symposium, this will be 43"x 36" If you have not already created your poster, you can download one of our templates here: Undergraduate Symposium Blank File Starter (43"x36") Or Poster Blank File Starter (48"x36") For more guidance on creating and designing posters, click here Export your poster as a TIFF File. For exporting instructions, click here Open your poster in Photoshop (Note: All InfoLabs Desktops have Photoshop access) Check your print’s quality: Zoom in to 100% Move around on the poster looking for distortion, blurriness, or pixelation of images and text If there are any issues, see the troubleshooting section here Check the size of your print: Click "Image" Click "Image Size" Your Poster MUST MATCH what your program administrators have set. For the Undergraduate Symposium, this will be 43" x 36". Go to poster.library.wisc.edu Click “Sign in to your library account” Click “NetID Sign in” Sign in with your NetID and password Click "Complete Your Prepaid Order" Click into the order there: if there is more than one, it will be the poster with no image, status "Started", location "College Library", Quantity 1, and Paper Type "Satin". It will also have a green "PREPAID" indicator To Upload via File: Click “Choose File” Select the file you would like to print Click “Open” To Upload via URL: Select “URL” Paste the Share URL into the box Click “Next” The Width, Height, Quantity and Paper Type will not be editable Click “Next” Look over the “Order Details” page for accuracy If you have any issues, email ltghelpdesk@library.wisc.edu for assistance If everything looks good, click “Finalize Order” You will receive an email confirming the submission of your poster. Please keep an eye out for any follow-up emails that may come if there are any issues with your poster. You will also receive an email when the poster is ready to be picked up. You will pick up your poster at College Library’s second floor service desk. Please inform staff that you are picking up a poster for a prepaid order. See Also Poster Printing Support for Patrons
